metadata.description: Cross-platform Claude Code and Codex plugin marketplace for pionless-agent. Provides a deep-research orchestrator (skill-shell) with leaf craft agents and 5 selectable report styles.

plugins.name: pionless-agent
plugins.description: Skill-shell deep-research orchestrator + leaf craft agents (worker / verifier / writer) + 5 report-style skills (technical-paper, position-paper, executive-briefing, landscape-scan, design-to-do).
